title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Tata Housing

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Tata Housing
jsonLd.description:
Tata Housing has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Aurangabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tata Housing:
Tata Housing is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Housing!
